items.headline_ai: Apollo Debt Solutions appoints Eric Rosenberg CFO and Adam Eling COO
items.snippet: Apollo Debt Solutions names Eric Rosenberg as Chief Financial Officer and Adam Eling as Chief Operating Officer, both effective October 2, 2023.

items.headline_ai: Apollo Debt Solutions declares $0.06 in special distributions across three monthly payments
items.snippet: Apollo Debt Solutions' board declares special distributions totaling $0.06 per share paid in three monthly installments of $0.02 each from March through May 2023.

items.headline_ai: Apollo Debt Solutions raises monthly distribution 13.6% to $0.1600 per share
items.snippet: Apollo Debt Solutions increases its regular monthly distribution from $0.1408 to $0.1600 per share, representing an 8.3% annualized yield based on October NAV of $23.07.

items.headline_ai: Apollo Debt Solutions launches with $1B in assets, breaks escrow with $657M equity
items.snippet: Apollo Debt Solutions BDC launches with more than $1B in assets under management after breaking escrow with approximately $657M in equity proceeds on January 7, 2022.
